name: Kids' 24pc Plastic Dinnerware Serving Set Cool Color - Pillowfort™
description: Add cool colors to your kid's dinnerware collection with the 24-Piece Plastic Dinnerware Serving Set from Pillowfort™. This dinnerware set includes lunch plates, round bowls, baby forks and spoons in cool tones to meet their everyday needs. Made of plastic, this BPA-free serving set has a microwave- and dishwasher-safe design for quick reheating of food and easy cleanup after use. Best of all, the set is reusable so that you can use it repeatedly.
